meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Scale Freelance AI Apps Faster
content.seo_description: Break free from basic app limitations. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship enterprise-grade SaaS apps in record time.
content.answer_block: Stop building basic CRUD apps that fail to scale. The Antigravity template provides a modular, production-ready architecture designed for rapid deployment. By combining this boilerplate with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate tasks, enforce architectural patterns, and deliver high-performance AI solutions that command premium freelance rates.
content.intro:
You’re staring at yet another project folder, feeling the crushing weight of repetitive boilerplate and the slow creep of technical debt. Your clients demand enterprise-grade AI features, but you're stuck reinventing the wheel, patching together fragile architectures that break at the first sign of scale. It is a cycle that kills your margins and stunts your growth.

But the ceiling is about to shatter. The Antigravity project template isn't just code; it's a structural paradigm shift. By integrating this with the raw power of Claude Code, you transition from a coder who writes lines to an architect who ships systems. It’s time to stop building apps and start building empires.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the core directory structure and environment configuration to ensure modularity and dependency isolation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity production-ready template with TypeScript, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Inject Domain-Specific Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your client's unique business requirements onto the existing Antigravity service layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a new service layer module for [Project Topic] that follows the Antigravity repository pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate domain service for user authentication and AI inference integration'

steps.title: Automate Type-Safe API Contracts
steps.description: Leverage the template's internal schema definitions to auto-generate frontend and backend type definitions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Sync the database schema with the API layer and generate TypeScript interfaces for all endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Sync Supabase schema with local types and update API contracts'

steps.title: Implement AI Orchestration
steps.description: Integrate the LLM middleware provided by the template to handle streaming responses and context management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the AI orchestration middleware to handle structured JSON output with error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Configure LLM stream handler in the middleware/ai-orchestrator.ts file'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Hardening
steps.description: Configure the CI/CD pipeline to ensure every commit is production-ready and performance-optimized.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for production deployment including edge caching and performance audits.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create github-actions.yml for deployment to Vercel with automated lighthouse audits'

pro_tips: Always wrap your AI service calls in a circuit breaker pattern to prevent cascading failures during API rate limits.
Use Antigravity's internal caching decorator to store LLM responses, drastically reducing your token costs for repetitive queries.
Implement 'feature flags' at the architecture level so you can deploy incomplete features without breaking the main production build.
Force Claude Code to write unit tests for every new service created by adding 'Write Jest tests' to your prompt chain.
Keep your database migrations small and idempotent to ensure your deployments never fail due to state synchronization errors.
content.next_steps: Once your boilerplate is live, implement a custom monitoring dashboard using the built-in observability tools in the Antigravity template to track AI latency and token usage.
content.conversion_block: You have the blueprint, the tools, and the workflow. The only thing missing is the execution. Stop settling for basic apps and start engineering high-value software that scales. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
